subcodes.first_line: O Samandar! God willing, through the grace of the Lord of Destiny, mayest thou in all conditions fix thy gaze upon the Most Great Horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سمندر انشاء الله بعنایت مالک قدر در کل احوال بمنظر اکبر ناظر باشی مکتوب
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
